t2a.caption: Silky R&B with a tight groove, warm Rhodes keys, subtle finger snaps, and a vocal melody that wraps around you.
t2a.lyrics:
[intro][verse]
Radio dot bot 
makes music on your PC
radio dot bot 
It's cost is next to free
radio dot bot
no cloud or subscriptions
radio dot bot
find it on steam

[chorus]
raidio dot bot...
raidio dot bot play a song for me.
yeah yeah yeah 
raidio dot bot....

[verse]
Radio dot bot 
makes music on your PC
radio dot bot
find it on steam

[outro]
